reason: Backend spec index and pre-development checklist for RealAnalyst metadata/report changes.
Clarifies skill, metadata, runtime, reports, and generated artifact responsibility boundaries.
Defines runtime registry and metadata index/search boundaries needed for report fact sourcing.
Defines Markdown report and CLI output contracts.
Guides CLI failure behavior for missing dataset, search failures, and registry gaps.
Required quality and testing gates for metadata/report behavior changes.
